theme: training montage planner for a multi-skill apprentice
title: Apprentice's Montage: Interference-Aware Skill Curriculum
strategies: grind-the-weakest: spend the entire budget re-drilling the single skill that starts lowest (the evaluator's own weak baseline); every other skill decays untouched the whole time
round-robin: cycle through all K skills in a fixed index order, equal shares for everyone, oblivious to the interference matrix and to which skills have already saturated

interference-graph block scheduling with a maximin-sized closing refresher: cluster skills into low-interference cliques by thresholding the pairwise antagonism matrix, order clique-blocks from least to most vulnerable-to-later-decay, size each skill's practice count to its diminishing-returns saturation point, then spend the remaining budget on myopic refreshers of whichever skill is currently worst so the maximin skill's LAST refresher lands late with minimal subsequent decay
full simulation-guided local search over the whole T-length sequence, using swaps/reinsertions to directly hill-climb the true maximin objective (open; strong is not optimal)
